HEXTECH_BURN_POWER.title: Burn
HEXTECH_BURN_POWER.description: Deal damage equal to this amount percent of current HP, with a minimum equal to this amount. Then Burn is reduced by [blue]10%[/blue].
HEXTECH_BURN_POWER.smartDescription: Deal damage equal to [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of current HP, with a minimum of [blue]{Amount}[/blue]. Then Burn is reduced by [blue]10%[/blue].
HEXTECH_ATTACK_REPLAY_POWER.title: Trick Magic
HEXTECH_ATTACK_REPLAY_POWER.description: The next Attack played is replayed a number of times equal to this amount.
HEXTECH_ATTACK_REPLAY_POWER.smartDescrip: The next Attack played is replayed [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s).
HEXTECH_PLAYER_SLOW_POWER.title: Slow
HEXTECH_PLAYER_SLOW_POWER.description: Damage you take changes by a percentage equal to this amount. Negative amounts reduce damage taken.
HEXTECH_PLAYER_SLOW_POWER.smartDescripti: Damage you take changes by [blue]{Amount}%[/blue]. Negative amounts reduce damage taken.
HEXTECH_OCEAN_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.title: Ocean Dragon Soul
HEXTECH_OCEAN_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.descript: At the end of your turn, heal HP equal to this amount.
HEXTECH_OCEAN_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.smartDes: At the end of this creature's turn, heal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
HEXTECH_INFERNAL_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.title: Infernal Dragon Soul
HEXTECH_INFERNAL_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.descr: The first Attack you play each turn applies [gold]Burn[/gold] equal to this amount to enemies.
HEXTECH_INFERNAL_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.smart: The first Attack played each turn applies [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold] to enemies.
HEXTECH_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.title: Hextech Dragon Soul
HEXTECH_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.description: Gain extra Energy equal to this amount each turn.
HEXTECH_MOUNTAIN_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.title: Mountain Dragon Soul
HEXTECH_MOUNTAIN_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.descr: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Plating[/gold] equal to this amount.
HEXTECH_MOUNTAIN_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.smart: At the start of this creature's turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].
HEXTECH_CHEMTECH_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.title: Chemtech Dragon Soul
HEXTECH_CHEMTECH_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.descr: At the start of your turn, obtain random Potions equal to this amount.
HEXTECH_CHEMTECH_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.smart: At the start of this creature's turn, obtain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random Potion(s).
HEXTECH_CLOUD_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.title: Cloud Dragon Soul
HEXTECH_CLOUD_DRAGON_SOUL_POWER.descript: Draw extra cards equal to this amount each turn.
HEXTECH_RUNE_SERPENT_FORM_PREVIEW.descri: Whenever you play a card, deal [blue]3[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
HEXTECH_RUNE_DEMON_FORM_PREVIEW.descript: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
HEXTECH_GALVANIC_POWER.title: Galvanic
